Interior Plaster in Travis County, TX

Star Stucco of Austin provides interior plaster services throughout Travis County, from downtown Austin condos to custom homes along Lake Travis. Our skilled plasterers bring refined wall finishes to both new construction and renovation projects across the county.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Refined Interior Finishes for Travis County Homes

Travis County homeowners increasingly want wall surfaces that go beyond standard drywall. Mid-century ranches in Rollingwood, modern builds in the Mueller neighborhood, and lakefront properties in Lakeway all benefit from the depth and texture that hand-applied plaster delivers. The result is a finished surface with character that flat paint over drywall simply cannot replicate.

Austin's design scene leans toward clean, contemporary lines balanced with natural materials — a combination that interior plaster handles well. Whether you want a polished Venetian finish in a dining room, a soft lime wash in a master bedroom, or a seamless skim coat to remove dated popcorn texture, our team tailors the approach to the architecture and style of your home.

We have completed plaster projects in every part of Travis County, from historic bungalows in Hyde Park to new townhomes in East Austin. That range of experience means we can match the look and feel you are after while accounting for the substrate conditions and humidity levels common across the region.

What's Included With Our Interior Plaster in Travis County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Design Consultation

We meet with you on-site to review wall conditions, discuss finish options, and select colors and textures that suit your space. You leave the consultation with a clear scope and realistic timeline.

Surface Preparation

Existing walls are cleaned, patched, and primed to ensure proper adhesion. We protect flooring, trim, and furnishings with drop cloths and masking before any material goes on the wall.

Base Coat Application

A bonding base coat is applied evenly across each surface, creating the foundation that the finish coat will build on. We use products rated for interior conditions and compatible with your substrate.

Decorative Finish Application

The final plaster layer is troweled, burnished, or textured by hand to achieve your chosen look. Multiple passes may be required for deeper effects like Venetian polishing or layered color washes.

Color Matching & Tinting

Integral pigments are mixed directly into the plaster so the color runs through the full thickness of the material. We can match existing walls, coordinate with cabinetry, or create custom tones.

Protective Sealing & Cleanup

Finished surfaces are sealed with an appropriate topcoat to guard against moisture and staining. We remove all protective coverings, clean the workspace, and walk you through care instructions.

Common Interior Plaster Needs in Travis County

Travis County homeowners come to us with a wide range of interior plaster needs. These are among the most common projects we handle in the Austin metro area.

Smooth Wall Finishes

Many Austin homes built in the 1980s and 1990s have heavy knockdown or orange peel textures that feel dated. We apply a smooth skim coat over the existing surface, giving walls a clean, modern appearance without the cost of full drywall replacement.

Decorative Plaster Accents

Accent walls, fireplace surrounds, and entryway features gain depth when finished with decorative plaster. We create subtle or dramatic effects depending on the room and your design goals.

Venetian Plaster

This multi-layer polished finish produces a luminous, marble-like surface that works especially well in formal living rooms and dining areas common in Travis County's upscale neighborhoods.

Interior Wall Restoration

Older plaster walls in Austin's historic districts sometimes develop cracks, hollow spots, or moisture damage. We stabilize and restore the original plaster rather than tearing it out, preserving the home's character.

Custom Textures for Feature Walls

From rough-hewn Mediterranean textures to subtle linen-like finishes, we create custom surfaces that serve as focal points in bedrooms, offices, and open living spaces across Travis County.

Skim Coating Over Textured Walls

A full skim coat transforms heavily textured drywall into a flat, paintable surface. This service is popular among Travis County homeowners updating older homes for resale or personal preference.

Why Choose Us for Interior Plaster in Travis County?

  • Artisan-level craftsmanship with decades of combined plastering experience across Central Texas
  • Wide selection of finish styles, from polished Venetian to rustic lime wash and everything between
  • Precise color matching so new plaster blends with your existing walls, trim, and design palette
  • Clean interior work practices — we mask, drape, and protect your home as if it were our own
  • Careful attention to detail on every edge, corner, and transition for a truly seamless result
  • Custom solutions tailored to each room's purpose, lighting, and architectural character

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Travis County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Interior Plaster Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Design Consultation

We visit your Travis County home, evaluate wall surfaces, and work through finish samples so you know exactly what the completed walls will look and feel like.

2

Surface Preparation & Priming

Walls are repaired, cleaned, and coated with a bonding primer suited to the substrate. Floors and fixtures are fully protected before application begins.

3

Plaster Application & Finishing

Our plasterers apply base and finish coats by hand, building up layers to achieve the selected texture and sheen. Each wall is completed in sequence to maintain consistent results.

4

Final Review & Touch-Ups

We walk the project with you to inspect every surface under different lighting conditions. Any spots that need refinement are addressed before the protective sealer is applied.
